transcript.text: Um, we have like, it's really flexible.

were you in the US at some point?

And then every like for every persona, you can find the research findings for that like specific age group.
So it's a little more defined.

And then we also have, like, a section right at the, I think, the end where we have, like, these motherhood moments, basically.

But it's better for it to go a little overboard.
We can always, always easily tone it down, like, with manual edits.
So it's not that big of a deal.
I would rather have it, like, be a little bit too much on some things rather than just, like, not executing at all.
And then this morning I spoke to Pedro, who is one of the software developers on our team, and he has updated the article generation workflow.
So now it reviews the article for scientific errors and sort of ambiguous claims.
And he's just like putting the finishing touches on it to incorporate like the information from the scientific dossiers into the outline and into the article draft.
And it also uses the dossiers like to fact check.
So that's what we're looking at right now.

Most important thing for me, because we need the workflow to address these dossiers and use them from the outline, so not just to tack them on at the end, because then we might make conflicting claims about specific ingredients, and the information just might be just too much, so we just want to make sure that the outline follows the dossiers and includes the claims that you want to make.
So that should be done today.
Once that's ready, we can do four or five new blogs, share them with you, and then we can do a round of reviews.
You can send them in as you get them done, and then I will, if have additional feedback, I can take them back to the dev team, and they can tweak the workflows further.

Yeah, it sounds good.
Okay, perfect.
And then...
As far as like the content OS goes.
So we uploaded additional assignments right here in the backlog.
If you go to ingredient science and supplement education, you're going to be able to find some like the ones that Joey suggested.
I'm going to actually go in and move them.
I moved just those to considering.
So it's easier for you to review because this group might include like other assignments that we don't want to do just yet.
So I'll move them to considering and then you can take a look.
Okay.

Yeah, there's going to be, I think like as a good culling mechanism would just simply be if there's an article that highlights an ingredient that we just don't have the kind of formulas, you can just go and nix it.

So we can just like get rid of those.

Okay.
It's helpful.
All right.

want to help that.

we could put either we could do it asynchronously or we could just do like a 30 minute call, like whatever.

It's really just a

Yeah, yeah, fair enough.

I don't know.

Yeah.

think they should be quite a bit better now.

I think just send them out as you do them.

Yeah.
Yeah.
So right now, the part where they've made the most progress is, like, using the Google Docs, like the dossiers.
But there is a separate fact checker.
Hold on, let me actually just take a look at the convo, just understand, like, what they did.

Thank you.
Thank Thank Thank

because I think they'll really share like the information that is like helpful to me to understand, but I can ask for clarification to see like what exactly it's addressing because they shared like all the documents.

If you could share that visual, that'd be cool.
Yeah, yeah.
I'll ask them.
I'm sure they could share something like that.
But, yeah, okay.
mean, the thing is, like, even if it can't, like, for example, in the case of, like, if something's gated, and we can't get, like, access to it, then in that case, it's better to just, like, not

So it refers to only like the documents that we have access to.

Okay.
Okay.
Perfect.
To go back really quickly to reviews.

Okay, okay, perfect.

I don't think so.

Before sending it to you.

it takes a couple of more, like it really...

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content strategy updates, workflow improvements, and next steps for Biologica's content creation process.](https://fathom.video/share/ZQSPKyzNMZ4rz4R4-s7yphdcCxbrReoo?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content artifacts (company overview, audience personas, writing guidelines) have been updated with recent feedback and research findings](https://fathom.video/share/ZQSPKyzNMZ4rz4R4-s7yphdcCxbrReoo?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
  - [Article generation workflow now includes scientific error checks and incorporates dossier information for fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/ZQSPKyzNMZ4rz4R4-s7yphdcCxbrReoo?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [New content gaps identified; Brian to review and provide feedback on proposed topics](https://fathom.video/share/ZQSPKyzNMZ4rz4R4-s7yphdcCxbrReoo?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [Review process to be streamlined with separate marketing and medical review stages](https://fathom.video/share/ZQSPKyzNMZ4rz4R4-s7yphdcCxbrReoo?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)
  - [1-2 new articles will be delivered by end of week for initial review](https://fathom.video/share/ZQSPKyzNMZ4rz4R4-s7yphdcCxbrReoo?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)

## Topics

### Content Artifact Updates

  - [Company overview updated with insights from founding story and pricing research](https://fathom.video/share/ZQSPKyzNMZ4rz4R4-s7yphdcCxbrReoo?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)
  - [Audience personas now include key insights from consumer research for specific age groups](https://fathom.video/share/ZQSPKyzNMZ4rz4R4-s7yphdcCxbrReoo?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
  - [Writing guidelines incorporate feedback from Maggie and Liz, including "motherhood moments" section](https://fathom.video/share/ZQSPKyzNMZ4rz4R4-s7yphdcCxbrReoo?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [AI-generated content may be slightly overprescriptive, but can be easily toned down with manual edits](https://fathom.video/share/ZQSPKyzNMZ4rz4R4-s7yphdcCxbrReoo?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)

### Article Generation Workflow Improvements

  - [Updated to review for scientific errors and ambiguous claims](https://fathom.video/share/ZQSPKyzNMZ4rz4R4-s7yphdcCxbrReoo?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [Incorporates information from scientific dossiers into outlines and drafts](https://fathom.video/share/ZQSPKyzNMZ4rz4R4-s7yphdcCxbrReoo?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Uses dossiers for fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/ZQSPKyzNMZ4rz4R4-s7yphdcCxbrReoo?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [Example: Perimenopausal anger article naturally incorporated Biologica in supplements section](https://fathom.video/share/ZQSPKyzNMZ4rz4R4-s7yphdcCxbrReoo?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [Workflow updates expected to be completed today](https://fathom.video/share/ZQSPKyzNMZ4rz4R4-s7yphdcCxbrReoo?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)

### Content Strategy and Gaps

  - [New assignments added to Content OS backlog](https://fathom.video/share/ZQSPKyzNMZ4rz4R4-s7yphdcCxbrReoo?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
  - [Aida identified cluster gaps in product education, healthcare, routine building, symptoms, myths, and product experience](https://fathom.video/share/ZQSPKyzNMZ4rz4R4-s7yphdcCxbrReoo?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [Some topics (e.g., "What makes Biologica different") require thought leadership approach rather than SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/ZQSPKyzNMZ4rz4R4-s7yphdcCxbrReoo?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - [Brian to review proposed topics and provide feedback on which to pursue](https://fathom.video/share/ZQSPKyzNMZ4rz4R4-s7yphdcCxbrReoo?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)

### Content Review Process

  - [Multiple reviewers involved: Maggie, Liz's mother (retired OBGYN), and potentially another doctor](https://fathom.video/share/ZQSPKyzNMZ4rz4R4-s7yphdcCxbrReoo?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
  - [Review stages to be separated into marketing review and medical review for better organization](https://fathom.video/share/ZQSPKyzNMZ4rz4R4-s7yphdcCxbrReoo?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)
  - [Goal is to streamline review process over time as workflow improves](https://fathom.video/share/ZQSPKyzNMZ4rz4R4-s7yphdcCxbrReoo?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)

### Post-Launch Growth Strategies

  - [Current focus is on launch, but content expansion will be a key opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/ZQSPKyzNMZ4rz4R4-s7yphdcCxbrReoo?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [Product expansion (e.g., Needle launch in Q4/Q1) will provide new topics for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/ZQSPKyzNMZ4rz4R4-s7yphdcCxbrReoo?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [Potential for partnership to extend beyond launch, including website copy review and email copy creation](https://fathom.video/share/ZQSPKyzNMZ4rz4R4-s7yphdcCxbrReoo?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### International Expansion

  - [Currently launching only in the U.S.](https://fathom.video/share/ZQSPKyzNMZ4rz4R4-s7yphdcCxbrReoo?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)
  - [No immediate plans for international expansion due to regulatory complexities](https://fathom.video/share/ZQSPKyzNMZ4rz4R4-s7yphdcCxbrReoo?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)

### Content Generation Capacity

  - [Team to send articles for review as they are completed](https://fathom.video/share/ZQSPKyzNMZ4rz4R4-s7yphdcCxbrReoo?tab=summary&timestamp=880.0)
  - [Brian comfortable with receiving 1-2 articles by end of week for initial review](https://fathom.video/share/ZQSPKyzNMZ4rz4R4-s7yphdcCxbrReoo?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)
  - [Full review process expected to take a couple of weeks to fully streamline](https://fathom.video/share/ZQSPKyzNMZ4rz4R4-s7yphdcCxbrReoo?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Brian to provide feedback on proposed content gap topics after consulting with Joey](https://fathom.video/share/ZQSPKyzNMZ4rz4R4-s7yphdcCxbrReoo?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
  - [Dev team to share visualization of updated workflow decision tree](https://fathom.video/share/ZQSPKyzNMZ4rz4R4-s7yphdcCxbrReoo?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
  - [Aida to follow up with dev team on specifics of fact-checking process and dossier integration](https://fathom.video/share/ZQSPKyzNMZ4rz4R4-s7yphdcCxbrReoo?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)
  - [Brian to share website copy and taglines when available to help with tone and CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/ZQSPKyzNMZ4rz4R4-s7yphdcCxbrReoo?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)
  - [Aida to deliver 1-2 new articles by end of week for initial review](https://fathom.video/share/ZQSPKyzNMZ4rz4R4-s7yphdcCxbrReoo?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)
  - [Team to implement separated marketing and medical review stages in Content OS](https://fathom.video/share/ZQSPKyzNMZ4rz4R4-s7yphdcCxbrReoo?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)

action_items.description: Follow up w/ dev team re fact-check process & workflow visualization
Review cluster gap doc, add feedback, get Joey's input, note in doc
Generate, edit & send 1-2 articles for review by Fri
